temporal_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man sitting in an office chair. He has short, dark hair and is wearing a light blue collared shirt. He appears pensive and stressed, with his hand covering his mouth as he looks down and to the side. The background consists of out-of-focus window blinds. In the top left corner, the Chinese characters "风行网" are visible. The audio consists of a slow, melancholic instrumental piece. A gentle, somber melody, likely played on a string instrument, creates a pensive and slightly sad atmosphere. The music is quiet and contemplative, evoking a sense of quiet worry or deep thought. The camera angle shifts to a medium close-up, focusing on the man's hands and torso. He is now seen from the chest down, still seated at a desk. He wears a dark tie with his light blue shirt. His hands are busy at the desk, fiddling with some papers and a small, dark object, possibly a pen or a small tool. The desk is cluttered with papers and other office items. The "风行网" text remains in the top left corner. The camera remains steady, maintaining a shallow depth of field that keeps the man's hands in sharp focus while the rest of the scene is blurred. There is no dialogue or any other sound effects, allowing the mournful music to be the sole focus of the audio experience.
